pyproject.toml.purpose: Terminal output formatting and rich UI components

src/musicalizer/cli.py.file_purpose: CLI command interface with Click framework
components: Main command group with version option
evaluate command with input file path
auto-improve command with iterations and target-score
presets subcommand group with list functionality

patterns_discovered.description: Uses asyncio.run() to wrap async core logic within synchronous Click commands
patterns_discovered.purpose: Bridge gap between Click's sync command structure and async business logic

patterns_discovered.description: Uses rich.console.Console for styled terminal output with panels and tables
examples: Table for evaluation results and presets

patterns_discovered.description: Defers imports until command execution within try blocks
patterns_discovered.purpose: Avoid circular dependencies and reduce startup time

patterns_discovered.description: Settings object provides API keys and configuration validation

gotchas_discovered.issue: Provider fallback logic in evaluate command
gotchas_discovered.description: Automatically detects available provider from settings without explicit flag
gotchas_discovered.potential_problem: May use unexpected provider if multiple API keys configured
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: User should be aware of priority (gemini checked before chutes)

gotchas_discovered.description: Creates minimal Preset object when original cannot be determined
gotchas_discovered.potential_problem: May lose original preset context and configuration
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider storing preset info in generation records for full reconstruction

gotchas_discovered.description: iterations and target-score parameters lack range validation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could cause unexpected behavior or silent failures

gotchas_discovered.description: asyncio.run() creates new event loops for each command execution
gotchas_discovered.potential_problem: No connection reuse between commands; inefficient for multiple invocations
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider application context or connection pooling for interactive sessions

features_implemented: Click command group with version option
presets subcommand group with list functionality
Rich terminal formatting for all outputs
Error handling with rich error console
approach_outcome.commit: 0db509b auto-claude: subtask-5-1 - Create cli.py with Click command group and subcommands

recommendations.recommendation: Add parameter validation for iterations (>0) and target-score (0.0-1.0)
recommendations.rationale: Prevent invalid configurations from causing unexpected behavior

recommendations.recommendation: Add progress bars for generate and auto-improve commands
recommendations.implementation: Use rich.progress.Progress for visual feedback on long operations
recommendations.benefit: Better user experience during extended operations

recommendations.recommendation: Make provider selection explicit in evaluate command
recommendations.rationale: Avoid ambiguity when multiple API keys are configured
recommendations.implementation: Add optional --provider flag or explicit user prompt

recommendations.recommendation: Cache provider instances across command invocations
recommendations.rationale: Reduce overhead when running multiple commands sequentially
recommendations.implementation: Consider Click context or application-level provider cache

recommendations.recommendation: Store and retrieve original preset info from generation records
recommendations.rationale: Enable complete preset reconstruction in evaluate command
recommendations.implementation: Include preset reference in GenerationRecord model

recommendations.benefit: Better integration with automation and CI/CD pipelines
Better troubleshooting for users experiencing issues

recommendations.recommendation: Add docstring examples showing command usage patterns
